allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('peers:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('deps:', JSON.stringify\(d.dependencies||{}, null, 2\)\); console.log\('peers:', JSON.stringify\(d.peerDependencies||{}, null, 2\)\);")
